structure.title: 中国电信 5G 网络建设进展报告
structure.summary: The partial document is a progress report on the 5G network construction project in the East China region by China Telecom. It covers the project timeline (March 1, 2026, to March 18, 2026), key updates such as the completion of core equipment installation in the machine room, readiness for joint debugging, and the completion of tower construction at a specific site. The next steps include site power connection and joint testing. Risks like potential delays due to rain and pending approvals for power access are highlighted. The report also includes attached photos of the completed installations and concludes that the project is ready to proceed to the next construction phase.

nodes.title: 机房安装检查照片
nodes.summary: The partial document describes a site inspection conducted in the core machine room A on March 18, 2026. The inspection covered equipment installation, cabinet inspection, temperature and humidity checks, and wiring checks. The conclusion of the inspection was marked as "passed," with on-site maintenance personnel actively examining the cabinet and equipment installation.

nodes.title: 信号塔完工照片
nodes.summary: The partial document provides details about the completion of a signal tower at South District Site 3, including the installation of the tower structure, antenna mounting, and communication equipment fixation. The main structure and multiple antenna devices have been installed, with further steps involving power connection and system debugging. The completion date is noted as March 17, 2026.
